headline: AMD Meta AI Chip Pact Puts Data Center Growth And Valuation In Focus
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) has agreed its largest AI chip deal to date with Meta Platforms, tied to a multi-year 6-gigawatt Instinct GPU rollout. The agreement includes up to 160 million share warrants for Meta, linked to shipment milestones that could result in roughly 10% dilution for existing shareholders. AMD plans to ramp shipments of its MI450 AI accelerators in 2026, with deployments expected at Meta and OpenAI. For investors following AMD’s data center story, this deal puts AI accelerators...
